title: Finnish Opinions on Security Policy and National Defence 2017
description: The annual survey charted Finnish public opinion on foreign policy, defence policy, security, military alliances, military service, and ongoing international armed conflicts at the time of the survey. Some questions examined views on factors affecting safety and security. Opinions were charted on the success of foreign policy in the previous few years, funds allocated to the Defence Forces, whether Finland should resort to armed defence in case of any sort of attack, and how the global security
